room.caption: [DiscoA] Once more.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(88) global.desertHeat=1500
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh19MainA) mapScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh19SideA)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(28) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)
SS_SetSoundFreq(global.msc_Discombobulated,22050)

instance.creationCode:
sprite_index=sWarpGateStand bShowArrow=false exitType=0 newMapX=3744 newMapY=288 toRoom=rDiscoC y+=32
if global.gameProgress<=4700 {instance_destroy()}
sprite_index=sNormalDoor bShowArrow=true exitType=0 newMapX=512 newMapY=336 toRoom=rMain_87 colorChange=1
